heading: Delete a GridFS Bucket
body:
Use the `drop()` method to remove a bucket's `files` and `chunks`
collections, which effectively deletes the bucket. The following
code example shows you how to delete a GridFS bucket:

```javascript
bucket.drop();
```

For more information on this method, see the [drop()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/GridFSBucket.html#drop)
API documentation.
